name: travel-companion
description: AI-powered travel planning and booking platform

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: cd packages/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:web && npm run lint:fix:api
scripts.lint:fix:api: cd packages/api && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api
scripts.format:api: cd packages/api && uv run ruff format .
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:web && npm run type-check:api
scripts.type-check:api: cd packages/api && uv run mypy src/travel_companion/
scripts.clean: npm run clean:web && npm run clean:api && npm run clean:root
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/web && npm install && cd ../api && uv sync --dev && cd ../..
scripts.update:deps: npm update && cd packages/web && npm update && cd ../api && uv sync --upgrade && cd ../..
scripts.security:audit: npm audit && cd packages/web && npm audit && cd ../..
scripts.security:fix: npm audit fix && cd packages/web && npm audit fix && cd ../..
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test
scripts.postinstall: echo '🏝️ Travel Companion workspace installed successfully!'

author: Travel Companion Team
